steps.title: Identify favorable and total outcomes
steps.content: We need to find the probability of selecting a white button. Count the favorable outcomes: there are 8 white buttons. Count the total number of buttons in the bag: 20 total.

steps.title: Apply the probability formula
steps.content:
The probability of selecting a white button is:

$$P(\text{white}) = \frac{\text{favorable outcomes}}{\text{total outcomes}} = \frac{8}{20}$$

That matches choice B — B is correct.
